titleStmt.title: SII 27.200: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 200. (A.R. No. 574 of 1929-30.) AMBAḶAPĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up by the side of the east verandah in the prākāra of the Janārdanasvāmin temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1493, Pramōdūta, Dhanus 4, Sunday, corresponding to 1570 A.D., December 2, the weekday, however, being Saturday. The Śaka year was current.

It registers endowments of land for the worship of land offerings to god Janārdanadēva of Aṁbaḷapāḍi by Śrīdhara Niḍuṁbūra, who had the temple of the above deity reconstructed after his return from Rāmēśvara where he had been on pilgrimage. It states that on the date Rāmakṛishṇappa-voḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya under the orders of Rāmarāja-nāyaka of Keḷadi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipataĒ namaḥ . namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mū
la staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī vijayādbhudaya śālivāhana śakavaruśa 1492 ne pramōdūta saṁvatsarake saluva dhanuvina
tiṁgaḷu nākane Ādivāradalu . śrīmmaṁ mahāmaṁḍalēśvara . rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa śrī sadāśiva (.) rāyaru . vijayanāgarada siṁhmāsanadalli kuḷitu . sukha saktathā prasaṁreadsatkathā or sankathā.
gadiṁ rājyavapratipālisuvāga . śrī rāyara nirūpadiṁda . keḷadiya rāmarājanāyaka Ayiyyanavaru ṭada keḷaga
ṇa rājyava pratipālisuvāga Ā rāmarāja nāyaka Ayiyanavara nirūpadiṁda rāmakṛṣṇappa voḍeyaru bārakūra siṁhāsanadalli
kuḷitu . dharmava niyamadalli . rājyavanāḷuvāga . Ā rāmakṛṣṇappa voḍeyara nirūpadiṁda baradasāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare . braṁ
hakṣatriyaru maṁppaḷi niḍuṁbūrara . kumāra śrīdharā niḍuṁbūrarū . rāmēśvarakke tīrtha
yātrege hōgi tīrthasnānavamāḍi . tirugi niḍuṁbūrigebaṁdu Aṁbaḷapāḍiya janārdanadēvara dēvālyada jīrnnō
dhāravāgi kalalikaṭisi . dēvarige nevēdya nityaśrībali vinayōgakke biṭa taḷada vivara pā dēvarige yirisuva Akki taḷada
vivara maḷakada gaddeyalli mu 3 majajalyagadeli mu 4 bābburigana gadeyali mu 6 sēna
panagaddelli mu 2 yaṁ bāri Eṁbagaddelli . mu 3 ga bēvina maṭhada mēlekaṭṭida baḍimu 2
putturalli kōbaḷa beṭṭu bayalli hebbalasinaḍi gadde 1 tirumalemaneyaḍi bāgila gadde 2 beggana
maneyaḍi bāgila gadde . puttūra bīḍina mūḍahādi . gōbara beṭṭu . yi sarvvasvada . gēṇi Aki mu 13 . daiva vokkalu dēvarigetiru
māle 1 neyyaṁpaḷiyali . nakada Aḍigade daḷipa Aṇagaivva gēṇimu 9 . baḍaga bayalli gōputumāreṁba gadegēṇi . mu 2
hā 20 . mūḍamananeyali . vosara baṁḍārigaiva taḷa . bāvigade mu 1 na tuṁbaḷiyali . teṁgina tōṭadalli tapakoḍudu hā . 40
basavarāna keyyali . selitanana sarvvasvadalli . mu 2¢ nareyanabaḷiya . baṁcugeyiva . jāṇeṭṭi baḷili mu 2 kaṁḍikeyyalli . koḍe
sōnabayyali kuṁji heṁbārati mane mūḍabaḷi Eṁbagadeyali . mu 3 kaḷibayali . kumeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
guṁḍiyiṁda mūḍalu . mōgaṇa Eraḍu gaddeli . mu 4 guṁḍi Eṁba bayalli kallasādina . gaddeyyali mu 3
rāmakēsana bāgilagaddeyyali . mu 1 Aṁṇa cakarana . maki mu 2 pānaṁbi bayyali . bānasāḍina gaddeyali mu 2
hā 20 paḍuva muṁnūralli . kuṁjimāṇi hitilagadeyali . mu 1 parasina bayyali . saḍuvaṇana . dili . koṁḍa gaddeyya
li mu 3 Arakaḷada beṭṭili . seṁkarabōvina maneAḍi bāgila gadeyyali . mu 2 siriya bayyali sālabaḷiyyali . paṭṭila gaddeyya
li mu 3 Āṭa pāciyiki sāṁdupina vōdake hānehattu . 4 . vābutiṁmmappana heṁḍati bālu yirista Amataḷada vivara . neja
kāremba bayalinalli hāne Āṭigaddeli . rmu .-. vobugaluri yirisūda . Akivorili voṁbatu māreṁba gadeyyali . ma
ridi beṭa tilakaEṁba gaddeyiṁdalu mu 1 dēvālyada mūḍa gadeyyali mu 1 saṁkara kokkōḍana sarvvasvada
li kaṭida baḷimu 1 gōviṁdāḷuvaneṁba gaddeyyali mu 2 .-. Aguḷi sāvitriyarisuva Akkitaḷida viva
ra nālatumāreṁba gadeyyali mu 8 .-. sarasatti yirisu Akkitaḷada vivara . muke majalataḷadali mu 1 koṭṭu naḍasū
du . lakumaṇanamane mūḍa majala tulinali . mu 1 ka . Avara gadde yiṁdalu mu 2 Aki gēṇivoḷage dēvarige naḍasu
va hā 40 gaurikiṭana janadalinaḍava Akimu 2 sāliṁdaṁ mūḍa Arekalliṁdaṁ paḍuva gaddedāri voḷage yi
vagēṇi mu 3 voḷage sarasatige mu 2 hā 20 . yosagaluri yirisuva Aki taḷada vivara . Aritōḍili . nāraṇa kokkoḍana ma
mane baḍaga bayali Aradukaḷadali . mu 6 tāḍivāḷasa geyivataḷa . tōḍiṁdaṁ mūḍa . kaliṁdaṁ paḍuva mu 3 Akki gēṇivoḷage
gaurige naḍavadu hā 30 bidire krusnana mane mūḍa bāgila gaddeyyali mu 1 kācigauri yirisuva Aki ta
ḷadavivara . Aritōḍiṁda Uduva 1 riṁda mu 2 nāraṇa kokkōḍana mane teṁka gadeyiṁda mu 1 baḍaga bāgila tā
yiṁda mu 6 .-. kuṁjirāḷaṁge malekaḷa . nāyakara ma ne Aḍi gadeyyali naḍava Aki mu 7 .-.
ta magaḷu gauri yirisuva Aka taḷada vivara . Uḍuvāḍi bayyali paṭēlagaddeyyalli . mu 4 kaṇārapāḍi bayyali
hi rigaṁke Eṁba gaddeyyali . mu 2 Ārukoyaleṁba gaddeli mu 1 mera vobaḷi Eṁba gaddeyyalli . hai 4
viṣṇukaṁbāranamane mūḍabāgila gaddeyyali mu 20 . kuṁjiyirisuva Akkitaḷada vivara śu 20 ke
kṛṣṇariṁdalu kaṭida baḍi mu 2¢ vayidyada Aṁṇake mārāṭhayiṁda mu 2¢ bālididēvana sarvvasvadalli ka
ṭṭida baḍḍimū 1 kṛṣṇana jannadali kaṭṭida baḍimu 1 māṁgōḍina tiṁmasēnapana sarvasvadalli kaṭidabaḍi mu 1
vōṇi Akaṁma yirisuva Aka taḷadavivara . neyaṁ paḷiyali beḷakilā Eṁba gaddelli . rmu kereUra bayali
kallaṇada gadeyyali mu 3 Aṁṇanāyana sādhu heddāriyiṁda paḍuvalu mūraṁ gaddeyalli mu 2 .-. gaṁdesara
yirisuva Aki taḷada vivara . kaḍakāra bayyali gadde narasiṁgāḍaṁka Eṁbagaddeyali . 3 muḍe Akki voḷage ma 1 kaṁ The word gadde is written above the line.
ṭina bayyali . nāruṭijika geyina . puḍuṁba Eṁba gaddeyali . mu 1 teriyama māli mu 2 kaḷiyabayyalli
baḍikila Aṇana jaṁnnadalli . kaṭida baḍi . mu 40 Aka madara cakarāyana voḷaci Ali mu 90 madake beṁma
ṇana Anatu . sarvasvadali kaṭṭida baḍḍi mu 1 baṁnnejebayyali . hesara gadeyyalli mu 1 kaḷiya bayya
li . Aṇa mucakarana gaddeyiṁdaṁ teṁka gaddeli . mu 10 niḍitāḷana sarvasvadali . kaṭada baḍḍi mu 2 dōṇi
tabeṭili . maṭhava paṭada mūlagaddeli . mu 1 kiṁnnama kiṭṭana sarvvasvadalli kaṭṭida baḍḍi . mu 2 bāleUḍuva śiva
geyiva sāla baḷigaddeyyali . mu 1 kinniśivageyiva manyakaneṁba muḍavoma gaddeli . mu 1 kariyappa
rācana Ārageyida Avanamaneyiṁda paḍuva hoḷeya baḷiya gaddeli . mu 1 .-. sūdra śivayirisu
vaAka taḷada vivara niṭeUrali . cakerāyanamane mūḍa mukeyyali bāvi gaddeyyali mu 1 hā 30 karumajara maṭha
da teṁkalu baḷiEṁ mūru gaddellimu 2 koyakuḷi bayyalli koṭekaṁbaḷi Eṁba gaddeyyali mu 2 voḷa
gaṇa majalli baggamāḍana maneyiṁda paḍuvadoḍḍagaddelli . mu 66 . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāṁ . yō harē
ti vasuṁdharā . śaṣṭirvvaruśa sahasrāṇi yiṣṭāyā jāyatē krim�o . dānapālana yōrmadhyē . dānāśrēyōnupālanā . dānāsvargamavāpnōti pālanā . daccutaṁ padaṁ śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
